data.description:
Own transient-failure retries at the httpx transport layer (`AsyncTenacityTransport`) so a mid-agentic-run blip self-heals below the agent graph, without re-executing already-run (side-effecting) tools.

## Why
A transient 429/529/5xx during a tool-using gate op must recover WITHOUT restarting the agent loop — a restart re-posts side-effecting tool calls (ticket comments) and multiplies token cost. The community answer (pydantic-ai docs; Anthropic/OpenAI SDKs) is per-request retry at the HTTP transport, which re-sends only the one failed call; completed tool results are untouched.

## What
Attach an `AsyncTenacityTransport` to the `httpx.AsyncClient` handed to `AnthropicProvider`, and build `AsyncAnthropic(..., max_retries=0)` passed as `anthropic_client=` so retries live at exactly one layer (no multiplicative retries). Retry `{429, 529, 500, 502, 503, 504}` plus `httpx.TimeoutException` / `httpx.ConnectError` via a `validate_response` callback (status codes are not exceptions by default), with `wait_retry_after` (honor `Retry-After`, cap at max_wait), `stop_after_attempt(N)`, `reraise=True`. **Add 529 explicitly** — pydantic-ai's sample list omits it. Wire the transport at the Anthropic-direct model-construction seam (`runner.py:238-245`).

## Scope
- Transport wiring + config keys `verify.llm_retry_max_attempts`, `verify.llm_retry_max_wait_s` + docs.
- Make the ticket-comment tool idempotent (client-generated dedupe key) so a block-then-rerun (or a future resume) can't double-post.
- NOT in scope: message-history-replay resume (a future Tier-2; noted, not built).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Retries owned solely by the transport; SDK `max_retries=0` verified in a test.
- [ ] 529 + the transient set retried; `Retry-After` honored and capped at `verify.llm_retry_max_wait_s`.
- [ ] A mid-run transient (injected) self-heals with no tool re-execution: the RED case flips GREEN and asserts no duplicate comment.
- [ ] The comment tool is idempotent on re-run (dedupe-key test).
- [ ] `make test`/`make lint`/`make typecheck` green.

Files: `src/rebar/llm/runner.py`, `src/rebar/config.py`, `src/rebar/_config_schema.py`, the rebar comment-tool surface used by the agentic runner.
data.title: Self-healing retry at the httpx transport layer (AsyncTenacityTransport), SDK max_retries=0
